user.title: Select Devices
user.description: Choose the media player devices to monitor with parental controls.

content_rules.title: Content Rules
content_rules.description: Configure which apps and content types to block or allow. Use comma-separated lists.

data.content_rating_max: Maximum content rating (used by AI analysis)
data.music_rating_max: Music rating policy (used by AI analysis)

time_limits.title: Time & Strike Limits
time_limits.description: Set daily usage limits and the strike threshold for device lockout. Set any value to 0 for unlimited.

data.tracked_apps: Apps to track for usage limit (comma-separated)
data.tracked_apps_daily_limit: Tracked apps daily limit in minutes (0 = unlimited)
data.media_usage_daily_limit: Total media usage daily limit in minutes (0 = unlimited)
data.media_usage_track_only_allowed_hours: Only track usage during allowed hours
data.usage_limit_mode: Usage limit enforcement mode (per device or aggregate)
data.video_daily_limit: Video daily limit in minutes (0 = unlimited)
data.audio_daily_limit: Audio daily limit in minutes (0 = unlimited)

blocking.title: Blocking Behavior
blocking.description: Configure how blocked content is handled. Optionally enable push notifications to receive alerts on your phone when a device is locked.

data.push_notify_enabled: Enable companion app notifications on lockout

openai.title: AI Content Analysis
openai.description: Optionally use OpenAI (via the HA Conversation integration) to analyze content that passes local filters. This uses tokens but catches content that keyword matching misses.

error.tts_service_invalid_format: TTS entity must be in 'tts.name' format (e.g., tts.piper).
TTS entity must be in 'tts.name' format (e.g., tts.piper).

init.title: Parental Controls Options
init.description: Modify parental control settings. Changes take effect immediately.

data.music_rating_max: Music rating policy (used by AI analysis)

data.media_usage_daily_limit: Total media usage daily limit in minutes (0 = unlimited)
data.media_usage_track_only_allowed_hours: Only track usage during allowed hours
data.usage_limit_mode: Usage limit enforcement mode (per device or aggregate)

data.audio_daily_limit: Audio daily limit in minutes (0 = unlimited)
data.push_notify_enabled: Enable companion app notifications on lockout
